Skip to contents
rrlmgraphbench 0.1.0
  • Benchmark Report
  • Reference
Provides fixture projects and ground-truth datasets for benchmarking the rrlmgraph package. Fixtures range from a minimal data-science script project to a medium-sized Shiny application and a small R package, covering the full spectrum of project types supported by rrlmgraph.
